description: All-instances view: summary stats, resource table, CPU, memory, disk, and network across every host in the selected job.

panels.description: Threads waiting for CPU across all hosts. >2× core count = saturation.
panels.title: Max Processor Queue

panels.description: Live snapshot of all hosts. CPU % and Mem % show gradient bars. Click column headers to sort.
panels.title: All Instances — $job

panels.description: Threads waiting for CPU. Sustained >2 per core = saturation
panels.title: Processor Queue Length — All Instances

panels.description: High interrupt rate can indicate hardware or driver issues
panels.title: Interrupts/s — All Instances

panels.description: High context switch rate adds CPU scheduling overhead
panels.title: Context Switches/s — All Instances

panels.description: Watch for instances trending toward zero
panels.title: Available Memory — All Instances

panels.description: Sustained high page faults combined with swap activity = memory pressure
panels.title: Page Faults/s — All Instances

panels.description: Peak read throughput across all volumes per instance
panels.title: Disk Read Throughput — All Instances

panels.description: Max read latency across volumes. >20ms HDD or >1ms SSD is a concern
panels.title: Disk Read Latency — All Instances

panels.description: Any sustained non-zero values indicate NIC or driver problems
panels.title: Packet Errors & Discards — All Instances

title: Windows — Fleet Overview
